executive_summary.quality: Full CI gate pass including team must-pass gate
executive_summary.catalog: Large seeded catalog available and validated in containerized runtime
executive_summary.readiness: Ready for next guidance / staging rollout hardening

completed_milestones: Team product line launched (15 teams, 29 singular role agents, custom team builder)
Must-pass policy enforced (10 scenarios per team)
Reddit top-20 intake mapped, new skills generated, scenarios expanded
Promotion QA gate enforced + catalog QA metadata surfaced in UI
Docker + Postgres + worker migration baseline implemented and stabilized

problems_encountered_and_resolved.resolution: Restarted API, re-ran gate, returned green

problems_encountered_and_resolved.problem: Regression harness promotion expectation mismatched strict production gate behavior
problems_encountered_and_resolved.resolution: Updated regression check to accept valid gate-blocking responses

problems_encountered_and_resolved.problem: Docker/Postgres startup failed due to SQLite-specific PRAGMA checks
problems_encountered_and_resolved.resolution: Replaced startup migration checks with DB-agnostic SQLAlchemy inspection

problems_encountered_and_resolved.problem: Queue worker and API status visibility inconsistency in container mode
problems_encountered_and_resolved.resolution: Shared research volume, env-based API base override, queue-consumer stabilization

policy_and_enforcement.team_skill_integrity_rule: Enforced: team capabilities must map to standalone marketplace skills
policy_and_enforcement.must_pass_policy: 10 scenarios required per team for production promotion

open_risks.risk: Cloud staging deployment not yet executed end-to-end in managed environment
open_risks.mitigation: Run staging rollout with alerting/rollback drill checklist

open_risks.risk: Adapter distribution beyond OpenClaw still in design stage
open_risks.mitigation: Implement manifest endpoint + OpenClaw adapter v1 + second runtime adapter

recommended_next_phase_tasks: Execute staging deployment on cloud target with Postgres + object storage
Implement manifest endpoint + OpenClaw adapter contract execution path
Add publish-team weekly governance automation report
Introduce signed provenance for manifests and packs
Automate data seed/restore script in deployment pipeline
